creator: rlewis@liveoaktelecom.com
text:
Running "make install" from the /usr/ports/audio/xmms directory
	does produces an xmms binary that cannot load skins.

Fix: 

Add a dependency to the Makefile for /usr/ports/audio/xmms directory to
	include the unzip port in /usr/ports/archivers/unzip.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install xmms 1.2.4 from the /usr/ports/audio/xmms directory.
